block_device_mapping.description: Specifies the block devices to attach to the image, including EBS volumes.

component.description: A list of components that are included in the image recipe, specifying their ARNs and parameters.

date_created.description: The date and time when the image recipe was created.

description.description: A brief description of the image recipe.

id.description: The unique identifier of the image recipe.

name.description: The name of the image recipe.

owner.description: The AWS account ID of the owner of the image recipe.

parent_image.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the parent image used to create the recipe.

platform.description: The platform of the image, such as Windows or Linux.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the image recipe.

user_data_base64.description: User data for the image, encoded in base64.

version.description: The version of the image recipe.

working_directory.description: The working directory where the image recipe is created.
